_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells.

_contextSnippet: The data show statistically significant and dose dependent reduction in EdU uptake in VS cells that express Neurod1 relative to those treated with EV
resourceName: Primary human vestibular schwannoma (VS) cell cultures
details: Statistically significant and dose dependent reduction in EdU uptake in VS cells expressing Neurod1 relative to empty vector controls
